narrative:
Harrison Twp township has 1,471 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.1 percentage points.
